name: RadioGroup
description: Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

api.name: RadioGroup
api.description: Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

records.name: RadioGroupContext
records.signature:
RadioGroupContext(
        string? Value,
        EventCallback<string> OnSelect,
        List<string> ItemValues,
        Dictionary<string, string> ItemIds)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<RadioGroup @bind-Value="_selected">
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="default" />
        <Label>Default</Label>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="comfortable" />
        <Label>Comfortable</Label>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <RadioGroupItem Value="compact" />
        <Label>Compact</Label>
    </Flex>
</RadioGroup>

examples.title: Pricing Plan
examples.code:
<RadioGroup @bind-Value="_plan" Class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
    @foreach (var p in new[] { ("free", "Free", "$0"), ("pro", "Pro", "$15"), ("team", "Team", "$49") })
    {
        <label class="@($"flex flex-col items-center rounded-md border p-3 cursor-pointer {(_plan == p.Item1 ? \"border-primary\" : \"border-muted\")}")>
            <RadioGroupItem Value="@p.Item1" Class="sr-only" />
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="semibold">@p.Item2</Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="xs" Color="muted">@p.Item3/mo</Lumeo.Text>
        </label>
    }
</RadioGroup>

examples.title: With Form Field
examples.code:
<FormField Name="plan">
    <FormItem>
        <FormLabel>Notification preference</FormLabel>
        <RadioGroup @bind-Value="_notification">
            <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
                <RadioGroupItem Value="all" />
                <Label>All notifications</Label>
            </Flex>
            <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
                <RadioGroupItem Value="mentions" />
                <Label>Mentions only</Label>
            </Flex>
        </RadioGroup>
        <FormDescription>Choose how you want to be notified.</FormDescription>
    </FormItem>
</FormField>

mdSummary:
# RadioGroup

Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/radio-group

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RadioGroup | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | AriaLabelledBy | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupCard | Context | `RadioGroup.RadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| RadioGroupCard | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupCard | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| RadioGroupCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | Context | `RadioGroup.RadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| RadioGroupItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (RadioGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (RadioGroupCard) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (RadioGroupItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- `RadioGroupCard`, `RadioGroupItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `Context` (`RadioGroup.RadioGroupContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- ` ` — HandleKeyDown handles   in RadioGroupCard.razor

## Example
```razor
<RadioGroup />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files

- `UI/RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem.razor`
